reference.preconditions: [[REQUIRED: exact reference state, actor, data, environment, and input]]
reference.errors: [[REQUIRED: exact error behavior for the evidenced case]]

clone.preconditions: [[REQUIRED: matching clone state, actor, data, environment, and input]]
clone.observable: [[REQUIRED: exact current clone output or explicit absence]]
clone.state_effects: [[REQUIRED: exact current clone effects or none]]
clone.errors: [[REQUIRED: exact current error behavior or absence]]

target_behavior.preconditions: [[REQUIRED: exact normative state, actor, data, environment, and input]]
target_behavior.state_effects: [[REQUIRED: exact transaction, persistence, and side effects]]

allowed_fence.dirty_state_rule: [[REQUIRED: exact handling of pre-existing unrelated changes]]

change_map.symbol: [[REQUIRED: exact existing anchor or null for a new file]]

interface.contract: [[REQUIRED: exact interface schema, status, ordering, and compatibility]]

state.contract: [[REQUIRED: states, transitions, concurrency, idempotency, and recovery]]

data.contract: [[REQUIRED: ownership, schema, null/zero, precision, lifecycle, and migration]]

algorithm.contract: [[REQUIRED: inputs, units, indexing, tie rules, boundaries, and outputs]]

error.contract: [[REQUIRED: every applicable error condition, output, effects, and retry rule]]

security.contract: [[REQUIRED: authentication, authorization, isolation, validation, and secrets]]

telemetry.reason: [[REQUIRED: exact reason no telemetry contract applies]]

compatibility.contract: [[REQUIRED: versions, inputs, persisted state, clients, and upgrade window]]

steps.preconditions: [[REQUIRED: exact starting revision, dependencies, and state]]
steps.action: [[REQUIRED: one bounded edit or verification action]]

fixtures.origin: [[REQUIRED: independently derived origin and rights basis]]

tests.expected_result: [[REQUIRED: exact assertions, output, and prohibited effects]]

authorization.reason: [[REQUIRED: exact reason authorization behavior cannot vary]]

concurrency.reason: [[REQUIRED: exact reason no concurrent observation is possible]]

activation.contract: [[REQUIRED: exact order, command, owner, and success signal]]

rollback.contract: [[REQUIRED: trigger, exact command, state handling, and success proof]]

recovery.contract: [[REQUIRED: failure point, procedure, and verified recovered state]]

data_repair.reason: [[REQUIRED: exact reason no data repair occurs]]

backward_compatibility.contract: [[REQUIRED: compatibility window, consumers, persisted state, and exit condition]]

prohibited_shortcuts: [[REQUIRED: one implementation shortcut that cannot satisfy the contract]]

risks.proof: [[REQUIRED: command, test, or artifact proving the control]]

halts.trigger: [[REQUIRED: exact condition that forbids guessing or further edits]]
halts.question: [[REQUIRED: one answerable decision question]]
